headline: Walmart Seeking To Hire Digital, Cryptocurrency Lead
T-Mobile Investigates Massive Data Breach Affecting Up To 100M Customers
summary: T-Mobile US Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) is investigating an online forum post that claims the personal data of over 100 million users have been compromised, Vice reports.</

headline: Elon Musk Says SpaceX Will 'Probably' Be Ready To Land Humans On Moon Before 2024
summary: SpaceX founder and Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) owner Elon Musk on Saturday said that he expects to have the Starship lunar lander ready for the moon mission before 2024.

headline: 6 Retail Stocks That Could Benefit From A Record-Breaking Back-To-School Shopping Season
summary:
The COVID-19 pandemic caused disruptions to the back-to-school shopping season in 2020 as parents braced for hybrid and at-home learning.

With many schools expecting to resume in-person learning in 2021, the back-to-school shopping season could be a potential boon for retailers.

headline: 'The Suicide Squad' Rakes In $26.5M To Dominate US Weekend Box Office
summary: James Gunn’s “The Suicide Squad” topped the U.S. weekend box office with $26.5 million from a 4,002-screen premiere.

headline: Why This Tesla Analyst Sees Giga Berlin As Step Forward For EV Stock
summary: With indications emerging that Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA)'s overseas manufacturing plant in Germany may soon come online, an analyst at Wedbush is offering his take on the development.

headline: Why These Investors Are So Bullish On Nvidia Ahead Of Earnings
summary:
The CNBC investor panel on Friday discussed NVIDIA Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) ahead of its upcoming earnings report.

Nvidia is the "gold standard" in the semiconductor space, Odyssey Capital Advisors' Jason Snipe said.
